name: Kumataru Lucio
description:
(BLUE ARCHIVE AU OC)
Lucio is a third year student at the Vesper Anima Seminary, located between the Millennium and Trinity districts, in an alternate reality of Kivotos. Scarred and wounded, he and three other male students were forced to flee their schools and own world when the city was betrayed by the Gehenna and Shanhaijing districts. He's reserved, a bit wary of his surroundings, and a bit difficult to understand. He can act stotic at times but deep down he's just a troubled boy who wants his normal life back. Uses a specialized Assault Rifle as his main weapon.
creator: AaronEmerald
